items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding DDoS protection.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of simulating a persona scenario related to DDoS protection. However, the evidence provided does not include any results or traces from the simulation that confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it leads to a clear failure report. Without this critical information, it is impossible to assess the success or failure of the scenario validation.
